summary: Clear audience recording judged the best among available sources
review: The audience‑sourced DAT capture is praised as the top choice, delivering clear and balanced sound that edges out other versions. Reviewers note it wins “by a nose” over comparable sources, though no specific comments on the performance are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review focusing on the audio source; positive about recording quality but no information on musical performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Considered the best audience source among several good choices; clear and well‑balanced sound.
